title: BuildVideo
subtitle: AI Film & TV Studio
heroDescription: Transform your stories into stunning anime videos with AI. From script to screen in minutes, not months.

features.title: Unleash Infinite Creativity
features.subtitle: Full-process AI assistance, from script to final cut

script.title: AI Script Analysis
script.description: Paste your novel or script — AI automatically extracts characters, locations, plot structure, and generates a professional shooting script.

character.title: Character Workshop
character.description: Create unique, consistent anime characters. AI maintains visual identity across every scene and shot.

storyboard.title: Smart Storyboard
storyboard.description: One-click text to storyboard. AI generates camera angles, compositions, and shot sequences with precise narrative control.

world.title: World Building
world.description: Generate immersive scenes and environments. Build grand story backgrounds that match your creative vision.

voice.title: AI Voice Synthesis
voice.description: Multi-character voice acting with natural emotion. Choose from diverse voices or design custom character voices.

video.title: Video Assembly
video.description: Automatic video composition with transitions, subtitles, lip-sync, and background music. Export ready-to-publish content.

workflow.title: From Story to Screen in 4 Steps
workflow.subtitle: Our AI pipeline handles the complex production work

step1.title: Import Script
step1.description: Paste your novel, screenplay, or creative text

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Characters, scenes, and storyboards generated automatically

step3.title: Customize & Refine
step3.description: Fine-tune visuals, voices, and timing to your liking

cta.title: Ready to Create?
cta.subtitle: Start building your AI-powered video today. No credit card required.
